petition_title: Stop Data Center from being built in Carroll County Georgia
petition_title_2: Stop the Hickman Property data center in Villa Rica, GA!
petition_notes: First petition (2,579 sigs) is for the Atlas Development / Carroll County project. Second petition (766 sigs) is for the Hickman Property / Douglas County project nearby. Atlas Development pulled permitting request per Feb 2026 update.
opposition_group_notes: Founded by Zack Martin. Active Facebook presence. Successfully opposed Atlas Development's initial proposal in Temple.

petition_title: Oppose the data center proposal for Franklin, Kentucky
petition_notes: Started by Jasmine Butt. Franklin Planning Commission rejected data center rezoning. Data center developer subsequently sued Simpson County government over land use ordinance (Jan 2026).

petition_title: Protect Virginia Communities -- Regulate Data Center Growth Before It's Too Late
petition_notes: This is a statewide Virginia petition, not Hanover-specific. No Hanover County-specific Change.org petition found. However, HHHunt withdrew their data center proposal in Jan 2026 after planning commission voted to deny it.
opposition_website_notes: Community opposition website for Wyndham/Hanover County area. Organized community meetings and documented opposition to HHHunt's 410-acre data center campus proposal adjacent to Wyndham.

petition_title: Halt the Construction of the Meta Data Center in Appling, GA
petition_title_2: Halt the Construction of Columbia County Data Centers & Quarry
petition_notes: Multiple petitions found. The first two petitions (both at 2,213 sigs) may share the same signature count because they are related/linked campaigns. The CSRA petition (62 sigs) is a separate effort requesting temporary halt to all data center and quarry projects. Pumpkin Technology Campus (Trammell Crow) was approved 4-1 despite opposition. A citizen has filed lawsuits challenging the approvals.

No Change.org petition found for Ellendale/Dickey County. Community opposition organized through in-person meetings with 'No Eminent Domain' t-shirts and signs reading 'My land, my choice.' Applied Digital's data center construction is underway.

No Change.org petition found for Platte County / Project Kestrel. Opposition led by Presiding Commissioner Scott Fricker who publicly stated he 'can't support' the $100B data center campus. Opposition organized through official county channels rather than Change.org.

No Change.org petition found for Jerome Township. Opposition was organized through township meetings, resulting in a 9-month moratorium on new data center construction passed unanimously by trustees on Sep 3, 2025. Residents discussed referendum campaign.

No Change.org petition found for Preble County. Opposition organized through planning commission meetings and referendum threat. Developer Patrick Scanlon withdrew his rezoning application in October 2025 after residents organized a referendum campaign. Former state lawmaker Gene Krebs was prominent in opposition.

No Change.org petition found specific to Wood County / Meta data center. Opposition organized through planning commission meetings (150+ residents attended). Ohio law does not give counties authority to issue moratoriums for specific land uses, limiting formal opposition tools. Residents missed 30-day referendum window due to NDAs concealing Meta's identity.

No Change.org petition found specific to Sunbury / Amazon data center. Opposition organized through packed public meetings and social media. Public hearing on rezoning 330+ acres postponed to March 23 due to parcel number error. Residents organized on social media to raise awareness.

petition_title: Prevent AI data center development in Wilmington, OH
opposition_group_notes: Formerly 'Wilmington Data Center Discussion Forum' on Facebook. Also organized 'Take Action Wilmington' protest at Clinton County Courthouse. WRFRD seeking 1,124+ voter signatures for ballot referendum.

petition_title: Oppose third reading of Ordinance 2026-01 in Marion County
petition_notes: Stream Data Centers 'Project Liberty' - $2.4B project. County council hastily approved tax breaks during winter storm. Petition raises concerns about environmental impacts, lack of transparency, and impacts on historically Black communities.

No Change.org petition found. Opposition organized through Preserve Montgomery County LLC (registered agent: Sabrina Cope of Truxton) and Facebook group 'Stop the Data Dump on New Florence'. Preserve Montgomery County filed lawsuit Feb 16, 2026 alleging Sunshine Law violations against county and Missouri DED. Lawsuit seeks to void votes on development agreement and $35B industrial revenue bond ordinance.
opposition_facebook_name: Stop the Data Dump on New Florence

petition_notes: No Change.org petition found specific to Oregon, OH / Capacity LLC data center. City sold 170 acres to Capacity LLC. Opposition organized through town halls (residents packed Fassett Junior High School auditorium). Council vote on data center extension was contested, with abstention causing confusion about passage.

petition_title: Stop data center in Muscogee County
petition_notes: Petition opposes 'Project Ruby' $5.18B data center campus proposed for northeast Muscogee County, bordering Harris and Talbot counties. Petitioners affirm they are citizens/residents/property owners in or near Muscogee County. Buildout planned 2027-2030.
No Change.org petition found specific to Troup County. Opposition organized through the Troup County Anti-Data Center Coalition.
opposition_facebook_notes: Facebook page exists. Founded by Gage Bailey. Key activist: Cyndie Hutchings of LaGrange. Coalition successfully pushed for 90-day moratorium on data centers. Has drawn political engagement (Congressional candidate pledged support on their Facebook page).

petition_notes: No Change.org petition found for Beaver Dam / Meta data center.
opposition_group_name: Beaver Dam Education on Data Center Group
opposition_facebook_notes: Facebook group spearheading local opposition to Meta's $1B AI data center. Advised by Prescott Balch, retired tech professional who successfully opposed Microsoft data center in Caledonia. Group is encouraging challengers to run against incumbent Common Council members who voted for the project.

petition_notes: No Change.org petition found for Harvey County.
opposition_facebook_notes: Community group in West Sedgwick/Harvey County area. Held informational town hall March 2, 2026 at Colwich Elementary School. Focus on hyperscale data center impacts near Andale, Clearwater, and Colwich. Harvey County sits on Equus Beds Aquifer, a major water source for Wichita and south-central Kansas. County approved moratorium through end of 2028.

petition_notes: No Change.org petition found for Cassville / Driftless area.
opposition_group_name: No Data Centers in the Driftless
opposition_facebook_notes: Grassroots campaign organized by Melodie Betts and Pete Moris (Mount Hope resident). Facebook page in development as of initial meetings. Opposing proposed $1B data center near Cassville in Grant County. Informational meetings held at Lemon Door restaurant in Fennimore.

_note: Duplicate entry for Montgomery County with Facebook-specific data. See id montgomery-county-mo-2026-02-16 above for petition data.
opposition_facebook_name: Stop the Data Dump on New Florence
opposition_facebook_notes: Facebook group encouraged residents to attend town halls. Hundreds attended meetings at Montgomery County High School gymnasium. Preserve Montgomery County LLC filed lawsuit Feb 16, 2026. Registered agent: Sabrina Cope of Truxton, MO.
